case_title: BRETT COOPER VS. KEITH B HALL et al

docket_entries.description: REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF DEFTS MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT HALL, KEITH B ARBOUEX, MARTHA

Daniel H. Rose, Esq., of the Law Offices of Daniel H. Rose, Tel. 415.946.8900, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

The court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS KEITH HALL AND MARTHA ARBOUEX'S Motion To Strike is taken off calendar per the parties' representation that the case has settled. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS KEITH HALL AND MARTHA ARBOUEX'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE COMPLAINT IS Granted with ten days leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)
